rulings.Case Title: SCOTT C DAVIS VS. URBAN LAND PRESERVATION, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action Until Arbitration Completed
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 2, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANTS URBAN LAND PRESERVATION AND JOHN ROWELL'S Motion, Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action Until Arbitration Completed is continued to June 10, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the reply to department 501 no later than June 2, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. The Court received courtesy copies of moving and opposition papers. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ABIGAIL ARANA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 2, 2015, line 9. DEFENDANTS ABIGAIL ARANA and JENNIFER GUTIERREZ'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT, DEFAULT JUDGMENT and LEAVE TO DEFEND, is GRANTED subject to (1) opposition; (2) defendants posting $7,969.03 with the Court no later than June 2, 2015 by 4:00 p.m.; and (3) defendants filing answer no later than June 2, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/REQ)

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 2, 2015, line 10. DEFENDANT MAURICIO ARROYAVE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint and Notice sufficiently allege facts to support a cause of action for Unlawful Detainer. Defendant and his counsel are ordered to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C in future. = (501/REQ)
